description: Negative z-index paints below in-flow content (CSS paint order step 2): an empty, sized, absolutely-positioned background div with z-index: -1 renders behind the hero text, while a positive z-index badge paints above everything. Also exercises CSS height on blocks (the band is an empty div sized by width/height alone).
visual_assertions: The yellow band paints behind the headline and paragraph text (text stays readable).
The red ON TOP badge paints above the band and the text.
The band is 480pt x 90pt from an empty div (CSS width/height honored).
Content after the hero sits below the band.
